ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tax_brackets" (
  "tax_bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax bracket */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate for the bracket (e.g., 10%, 15%) */,
  "single_lower_limit" TEXT /* Lower limit for Single filing status */,
  "single_upper_limit" TEXT /* Upper limit for Single filing status */,
  "head_of_household_lower_limit" TEXT /* Lower limit for Head of Household filing status */,
  "head_of_household_upper_limit" TEXT /* Upper limit for Head of Household filing status */,
  "married_joint_lower_limit" TEXT /* Lower limit for Married Joint filing status */,
  "married_joint_upper_limit" TEXT /* Upper limit for Married Joint filing status */,
  "married_separate_lower_limit" TEXT /* Lower limit for Married Separate filing status */,
  "married_separate_upper_limit" TEXT /* Upper limit for Married Separate filing status */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date for the tax bracket */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date for the tax bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_bracket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate (e.g., 10%, 15%) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filing_statuses" (
  "filing_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing status */,
  "filing_status" TEXT /* Filing status (e.g., Single, Head of Household) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filing status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxpayers" (
  "taxpayer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxpayer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the taxpayer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the taxpayer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the taxpayer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the taxpayer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the taxpayer */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income of the taxpayer */,
  "filing_status_id" INTEGER /* Filing status of the taxpayer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxpayer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxpayers_filing_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_status_id") REFERENCES filing_statuses ("filing_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_returns" (
  "tax_return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax return */,
  "taxpayer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxpayer who filed the return */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Year the tax return was filed */,
  "total_income" TEXT /* Total income */,
  "total_deductions" TEXT /* Total deductions */,
  "total_exemptions" TEXT /* Total exemptions */,
  "tax_owed" TEXT /* Amount of tax owed */,
  "refund" TEXT /* Amount of refund due */,
  "tax_bracket_id" INTEGER /* Tax bracket ID for the tax return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_returns_tax_bracket_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_bracket_id") REFERENCES tax_brackets ("tax_bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_returns_taxpayer_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxpayer_id") REFERENCES taxpayers ("taxpayer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_payments" (
  "tax_payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax payment */,
  "tax_return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax return the payment was made for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., check, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_payments_tax_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_return_id") REFERENCES tax_returns ("tax_return_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_refunds" (
  "tax_refund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax refund */,
  "tax_return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax return the refund was issued for */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date the refund was issued */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the refund */,
  "refund_method" TEXT /* Refund method (e.g., bank transfer, check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_refund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_refunds_tax_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_return_id") REFERENCES tax_returns ("tax_return_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "tax_return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax return being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit was conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the audit */,
  "audit_remarks" TEXT /* Remarks about the audit */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Status of the audit (e.g., pending, passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_tax_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_return_id") REFERENCES tax_returns ("tax_return_id")
)
